# Kisan Kamai

Kisan Kamai is a farm equipment marketplace for Maharashtra. The website helps equipment renters browse local machinery, helps owners manage listings and booking requests, and keeps payment coordination direct between owner and renter.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://www.kisankamai.com/
- Rent equipment: https://www.kisankamai.com/rent-equipment
- Equipment categories: https://www.kisankamai.com/categories
- Owner benefits: https://www.kisankamai.com/owner-benefits
- How it works: https://www.kisankamai.com/how-it-works
- Support: https://www.kisankamai.com/support
- Terms and safety: https://www.kisankamai.com/terms

## Notes for AI crawlers

- Public marketplace and information pages are indexable.
- Account, profile, listing-management, and API routes are not intended for indexing.
- Kisan Kamai does not process online rental payments; owners and renters settle directly offline.
